member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData
member.summary: This class represents the data structure of the Flow Loop Control json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.FlowItemControl
member.summary: Gets or sets List of Loop control configs to edit.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig
member.summary: Loop Control Config defines configName as id and respective FlowItem to edit for Loop Control.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.ConfigName
member.summary: Gets or sets configuration name to apply the settings for a given flow loop Control Instances.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsList
member.summary: Gets or sets flow items list to edit loop flow items.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit
member.summary: FlowItem Loop Control attributes to edit.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit.FlowName
member.summary: Gets or sets instance name to find the flow item.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit.LoopCount
member.summary: Gets or sets Count of loop to flowloop item.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit.LoopDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets time control to flowloop item.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit.SetBreakRange
member.summary: Gets or sets time control loop to flow item.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam
member.summary: Class to store all Loop Items config to pass to the Flow Loop Control APIs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.FlowLoopControlJsonData.LoopControlConfig.FlowItemsToEdit)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Constructor for LoopItem parameters to be set.
member.param: Loop item params from input config file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam.FlowItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets name of the FlowItem whose loop config will be changed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam.IsLoopCount
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether loop count or loop duration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam.LoopValue
member.summary: Gets or sets loop value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.LoopItemParam.BreakRange
member.summary: Gets or sets break range condition.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopControlTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopControlTestMethod.flowLoopListToModify
member.summary: The list of the LoppFlowItems to modify, this will points at run time to the correct element from the VerifyDataStructure.ListOfLoopFlowItemsPerConfig.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopControlTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopControlTestMethod.InputJsonConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the DummyParam1 (this comment will be used on the pre-header file).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopControlTestMethod.SetConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets the configname to selectively execute a set to modify Flow Loop Control.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.CountBasedLoopControl
member.summary: CountBasedLoop Flow control.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.CountBasedLoopControl.Execute(Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus)
member.summary: Defining Exit check method.
member.param: loop status passed from the main test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.ILoopControl
member.summary: Loop control interface to distinguish between time or count based.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.ILoopControl.Execute(Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus)
member.summary: Common functional for both Loop control method.
member.param: Flow Loop Status to be used in derived classes.
member.returns: Exit Port, derived by the implementation of respective classes.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopExitTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method to exit out of flow loops.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopExitTestMethod.FlowItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets the flow item name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.PrimeFlowLoopExitTestMethod.ItuffWriter
member.summary: Gets or sets ituff writer.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.TimeBasedLoopControl
member.summary: CountBasedLoop Flow control.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowLoop.TimeBasedLoopControl.Execute(Prime.TestProgramService.IFlowLoopStatus)
member.summary: Defining Exit check method.
member.param: loop status passed from the main test method.
